alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services managing global commercial operations with demonstrated portfolio ownership and scaling experience; built playbooks for territory management, pricing execution, and revenue accountability
alignments.job_requirement: Verantwortung für die vertragliche und kommerzielle Geschäftsbeziehung eines Portfolios von mittelständischen Partner-Busunternehmen

alignments.candidate_evidence: Conducted commercial contract negotiations and business-outcome partnerships with external stakeholders; experience translates directly to multi-party stakeholder management and deal structuring
alignments.job_requirement: Zentrale Ansprechperson für die Geschäftsführung unserer Buspartner inkl. Vertragsverhandlungen und betriebswirtschaftlicher Beratung

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient SQL (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries/CTEs, window functions); advanced Excel and Sheets; builds Looker dashboards; demonstrated experience translating operational data into executive decision support and performance reviews
alignments.job_requirement: Erstellung von Entscheidungsvorlagen auf Basis von Kosten- und Performanceanalysen für die FlixBus-Geschäftsführung

alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced Excel and Sheets skills; proficient SQL for data shaping; demonstrates quantitative and analytical mindset in portfolio optimization and cost-performance trade-off analysis
alignments.job_requirement: Ausgesprochene analytische Fähigkeiten und sehr gute Excel-Kenntnisse

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaled global commercial operations programs over eight years; demonstrated end-to-end program ownership including rollout, transformation, and business execution; project delivery embedded in strategy and operations background
alignments.job_requirement: Leitung kleinerer Projekte von der Konzeption bis zum Abschluss; Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Zielen, Timelines und Budgets

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German speaker and professional/fluent English; meets language requirements directly
alignments.job_requirement: Verhandlungssicheres Deutsch sowie sehr gute Englischkenntnisse

gaps.gap: No explicit partner-ecosystem operations or vendor-management background in stated history; Bus-industry and logistics domain unfamiliar
gaps.mitigation: Portfolio management and commercial operations fundamentals are domain-agnostic; candidate brings framework for rapid domain learning and stakeholder relationship scaling typical of hyper-growth tech to transport logistics

gaps.gap: Limited evidence of leading or negotiating complex transportation or supply-chain contracts; transportation/logistics domain exposure not mentioned
gaps.mitigation: Commercial contract negotiation experience in tech SaaS and partnership contexts is transferable; structured contracting playbooks and cost-performance frameworks port directly to bus-partner terms and revenue models

gaps.gap: No stated experience in fleet operations, capacity planning, route optimization, or carrier logistics; technical transport knowledge is absent
gaps.mitigation: Role does not require deep operational transport expertise; candidate's analytical and cross-functional program-management capability covers business-case analysis and partner coordination without needing engineering-level logistics mastery

output.level_rationale: JD requires minimum 2 years BE experience. role emphasizes portfolio ownership, contract negotiation, project leadership, and cross-functional coordination with executive visibility. Responsibilities align with senior individual-contributor or lead scope: central stakeholder management, decision-support analytics, and autonomous project direction suggest L4 without manager-of-managers authority typical of L5+. Company stage/size and Berlin location do not alter level assessment.
output.summary: Partner Manager role at Flix combines portfolio ownership, contract negotiation, cost-performance analytics, and cross-functional project leadership—a strong commercial-operations and partner-strategy fit. Candidate brings eight years of Google-scale commercial operations, analytical rigor (SQL, Excel, Looker), and demonstrated stakeholder and program management. Primary gaps are transportation-logistics domain unfamiliarity and no direct carrier/vendor-management history; both are manageable through domain ramp and stakeholder-relationship frameworks already deployed. Language requirements (native German, fluent English) are met. Advisory: strong operations fundamentals but domain transition; consider for candidate growth into transport sector.
uncertainties: Flix company size and stage not stated in JD; no salary posted; level confidence is moderate absent context on growth stage or team structure reporting to this role
Candidate's prior commercial-operations experience at Google centers on global commercial; DACH-region and SME-partner-focused scope may require recalibration of complexity and autonomy assumptions

No explicit mention of prior negotiations with fleet operators, carrier businesses, or supply-chain partners; transfer risk on relationship-building style and regulatory familiarity in transport sector is not quantified
